# Dependency Map — Line 10: Adjustments to Income (Schedule 1 Part II)

Tax year: **2025**

---

## 1. Computation identity

| Item | Value |
|---|---|
| Form 1040 label | Line 10 — Adjustments to income from Schedule 1, line 26 |
| Source | Schedule 1, line 26 (Part II total) |
| Formula | `line10 = line26 = sum(lines 11-23) + line25`; `line25 = sum(24a-24z)` |
| Backend orchestrator | `computeIncomeAdjustments(...)` at `TaxReturnComputeService.java:13840` |
| Call site | `TaxReturnComputeService.java:563` |
| Return type | `IncomeAdjustmentsComputation` record |
| Output model | `Schedule1Adjustments.java` |

Line 26 sum sites:
- **Schedule 1 line 25** — `TaxReturnComputeService.java:14145` (`sumAmounts(24a..24k, 24z)` — 12 sublines; 24l-24y absent)
- **Schedule 1 line 26** — `TaxReturnComputeService.java:14169` (`addNonNull(sumAmounts(11..23), line25)` — 13 operands + line 25)
- **Pub. 915 subset** — `TaxReturnComputeService.java:14181` (excludes lines 21 and 22)

Line 22 is hard-coded null at `TaxReturnComputeService.java:14084` per the 2025 form (reserved for future use).

---

## 2. Upstream inputs

### 2.1 Personal forms

| Form ID | Person | Key fields read |
|---|---|---|
| `income-adjustments-taxpayer` | Taxpayer | `hadIncomeAdjustmentsForSchedule1`, `educatorExpensesLine11`, `reservistPerformingArtistFeeBasisExpensesLine12`, `hsaDeductionLine13`, `movingExpensesArmedForcesLine14`, `movingExpensesStorageFeesOnlyLine14`, `penaltyOnEarlyWithdrawalOfSavingsLine18`, `alimonyPaidLine19a`, `alimonyRecipientSsnLine19b`, `alimonyAgreementDateLine19c`, `iraDeductionLine20`, `isCoveredByWorkplaceRetirementPlanTaxpayer`, `iraDeductionMfsLivedApartLine20`, `studentLoanInterestDeductionLine21`, `archerMsaDeductionLine23`, `otherAdjustment*Line24[a-k]`, `otherAdjustmentsItems24z`, `imported1099IntEarlyWithdrawalPenaltyTotal`, `imported1099OidEarlyWithdrawalPenaltyTotal`, `imported1098EBox1StudentLoanInterestTotal`, `importedK1Section67eExcessDeductionsTotal`, `hasDeductibleSelfEmploymentTaxLine15OutOfScope`, `hasSelfEmployedRetirementPlanAdjustmentLine16OutOfScope`, `hasSelfEmployedHealthInsuranceAdjustmentLine17OutOfScope` |
| `income-adjustments-spouse` | Spouse | Same fields (spouse scope), with `isCoveredByWorkplaceRetirementPlanSpouse` instead of the taxpayer variant |

> The `statementUploadCheck` fields (`confirmAllReceivedAdjustmentStatementsUploaded`, `received1098E`, `uploaded1098E`, etc.) were removed from the YAML and Angular component on 2026-04-17 as part of the statement-first UI refactor. The backend no longer reads or checks these fields.

### 2.2 Statement entries (direct parse)

| Statement type | Form ID | Field read | Target line |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1099-INT entries | `1099-int` | `earlyWithdrawalPenaltyAmount` | Line 18 (stacks with personal form manual entry) |
| 1099-OID entries | `1099-oid` | `earlyWithdrawalPenaltyAmount` | Line 18 (stacks with personal form manual entry) |
| 1098-E entries | `1098-e` | `studentLoanInterestReceivedAmount` | Line 21 (stacks with personal form manual entry; capped at $2,500) |
| K-1 (Form 1041) | `schedule-k1-1041` | `excessDeductionsSection67eAmount` | Line 24k (stacks with personal form `importedK1Section67eExcessDeductionsTotal`) |

### 2.3 Upstream computed values

| Source | Field | Line |
|---|---|---|
| `computeOtherIncomes()` result → `additionalIncome.getOtherIncomeOlympicParalympicAwards()` | `olympicLine8m` | Line 24c auto-fill |
| *(Schedule SE — out of scope)* | SE tax amount | Line 15 |
| *(SE retirement plans — out of scope)* | Plan contribution | Line 16 |
| *(SE health insurance — out of scope)* | Health insurance premium | Line 17 |

### 2.4 Filing status dependency

- **MFS guard** at orchestrator entry: `boolean isMfsReturn` parameter null-shadows `incomeAdjustmentsSpouse` so spouse-side data cannot leak. Critical because:
  - IRC §221(e)(2) blocks line 21 student-loan-interest deduction on MFS;
  - line 20 IRA deduction has a "MFS lived apart all year" flag;
  - line 19b/19c text fields use taxpayer-only `firstNonBlank`.
- 14th member of the single-guard MFS cascade. Lock-in test: `mfsExcludesSpouseIncomeAdjustmentsFromLine10`.

---

## 3. Downstream consumers

| Consumer | What it uses | How |
|---|---|---|
| `buildAdjustments()` | `line10FromSchedule1Line26()` | `line11a = subtractNonNegativeAllowNegative(line9, line10)` — signed AGI |
| `computeSocialSecurityBenefits()` | `incomeAdjustments.line10FromSchedule1Pub915Subset()` | **SUBSET accessor** at `TaxReturnComputeService.java:14897` — excludes line 21 (avoids MAGI circularity) and line 22 (reserved) |
| `computeEicEarned()` / `computeLine27aEIC()` | AGI via line 11a | EIC eligibility and phaseout |
| `computeForm8863()` | MAGI (Form 2555 add-back from line 11b) | Education credit phaseout |
| `computeForm8880()` | AGI (line 11a) | Saver's credit AGI limit |
| IRA phaseout in `buildAdjustments()` | `iraDeductionTaxpayer`, `iraDeductionSpouse`, `isCoveredByWorkplaceRetirementPlanTaxpayer/Spouse` | Per-person IRA MAGI phaseout (§219(g)) |
| PDF export / frontend display | `schedule1.adjustments.totalAdjustmentsToIncome` | Form 1040 line 10 display |

---

## 4. Output fields produced

**`Schedule1Adjustments` object:**

```
educatorExpenses                          → line 11 (capped at $300/person, $600 joint if both qualify, §62(a)(2)(D))
certainBusinessExpenses                   → line 12 (Form 2106)
healthSavingsAccountDeduction             → line 13 (Form 8889)
movingExpensesArmedForces                 → line 14 (Form 3903)
deductibleSelfEmploymentTax               → line 15 (null — OUT OF SCOPE blocking)
selfEmployedSepSimpleQualifiedPlans       → line 16 (null — OUT OF SCOPE blocking)
selfEmployedHealthInsuranceDeduction      → line 17 (null — OUT OF SCOPE blocking)
earlyWithdrawalPenalty                    → line 18 (manual + 1099-INT box 13 + 1099-OID box 13)
alimonyPaid                               → line 19a (null if post-2018 agreement, TCJA §11051)
alimonyPaidRecipientSsn                   → line 19b
alimonyPaidAgreementDate                  → line 19c (month/year)
iraDeduction                              → line 20 (after MAGI phaseout per §219(g); Pub. 590-A iterative)
studentLoanInterestDeduction              → line 21 (manual + 1098-E; cap $2,500; MFS=0; MAGI phaseout NOT yet enforced)
archerMsaDeduction                        → line 23 (Form 8853)
otherAdjustmentJuryDutyPay                → line 24a
otherAdjustmentRentalPersonalPropertyExpenses → line 24b
otherAdjustmentOlympicParalympicMedals    → line 24c
otherAdjustmentReforestation              → line 24d
otherAdjustmentRepaymentSupplementalUnemployment → line 24e
otherAdjustmentSection501c18d             → line 24f
otherAdjustmentChaplains403b              → line 24g
otherAdjustmentAttorneyFeesUnlawfulDiscrimination → line 24h
otherAdjustmentAttorneyFeesWhistleblower  → line 24i
otherAdjustmentHousingDeduction           → line 24j (Form 2555 housing DEDUCTION — distinct from line 8d exclusion)
otherAdjustmentExcessDeductionsSection67e → line 24k (personal form + K-1 (1041) box 11 code A statement entries)
otherAdjustmentOther                      → line 24z (narrow write-in only when a specific IRS instruction directs)
totalOtherAdjustments                     → line 25 = sum(24a..24k, 24z)
totalAdjustmentsToIncome                  → line 26 = sum(11..23) + line25 = Form 1040 line 10
```

**`IncomeAdjustmentsComputation` record accessors:**
- `.adjustments()` — the `Schedule1Adjustments` object above
- `.otherAdjustmentItems()` — `List<Schedule1OtherAdjustmentItem>` for line 24z write-in detail
- `.line10FromSchedule1Line26()` — `BigDecimal` (the line 10 amount used by Form 1040)
- `.line10FromSchedule1Pub915Subset()` — `BigDecimal` (SUBSET excluding lines 21 and 22; used by SS taxability worksheet to avoid MAGI circularity)
- `.iraDeductionTaxpayer()` — post-phaseout IRA deduction for taxpayer
- `.iraDeductionSpouse()` — post-phaseout IRA deduction for spouse
- `.isCoveredByWorkplaceRetirementPlanTaxpayer()` — Boolean (drives IRA phaseout thresholds)
- `.isCoveredByWorkplaceRetirementPlanSpouse()` — Boolean (drives IRA phaseout thresholds)

---

## 5. Flags emitted

| Flag code | Blocking | Condition |
|---|---|---|
| `INCOME_ADJUSTMENTS_LINE15_OUT_OF_SCOPE` | Yes | `hasDeductibleSelfEmploymentTaxLine15OutOfScope=true` (§1401 SE tax half) |
| `INCOME_ADJUSTMENTS_LINE16_OUT_OF_SCOPE` | Yes | `hasSelfEmployedRetirementPlanAdjustmentLine16OutOfScope=true` (SEP/SIMPLE/qualified) |
| `INCOME_ADJUSTMENTS_LINE17_OUT_OF_SCOPE` | Yes | `hasSelfEmployedHealthInsuranceAdjustmentLine17OutOfScope=true` (§162(l)) |
| `INCOME_ADJUSTMENTS_ALIMONY_POST_2018_NOT_DEDUCTIBLE` | Yes | `line19a > 0` and agreement date is 2019-01-01 or later (TCJA §11051) |

> **Removed 2026-04-17:** `INCOME_ADJUSTMENTS_STATEMENT_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED`, `INCOME_ADJUSTMENTS_MISSING_UPLOADED_1098_E`, `INCOME_ADJUSTMENTS_MISSING_UPLOADED_1099_INT_OID`, `INCOME_ADJUSTMENTS_MISSING_UPLOADED_K1_1041` — eliminated with the statement-first UI refactor; the backend now derives amounts directly from uploaded statement entries without requiring user confirmation.

---

## 6. Supporting IRS forms (associated with each line)

| Line | Supporting form |
|---|---|
| 12 | Form 2106 |
| 13 | Form 8889 |
| 14 | Form 3903 |
| 15 | Schedule SE (out of scope — blocking) |
| 17 | Form 7206 or Pub. 974 worksheet (out of scope — blocking) |
| 20 | IRA deduction worksheet (Pub. 590-A iterative); Form 8606 if nondeductible contributions |
| 21 | Student loan interest deduction worksheet; Pub. 970 if Form 2555 or Form 4563 (MAGI phaseout $85k/$170k → $100k/$200k MFJ; **not yet enforced in code**) |
| 23 | Form 8853 |
| 24j | Form 2555 (housing deduction — distinct from line 8d exclusion) |
| 24k | Schedule K-1 (Form 1041) box 11 code A |

---

## 7. Pub. 915 SUBSET vs. full line 26

Two distinct accessors live on `IncomeAdjustmentsComputation`:

- `line10FromSchedule1Line26()` — full line 26 (used by Form 1040 line 10).
- `line10FromSchedule1Pub915Subset()` — subset excluding line 21 (student loan interest) and line 22 (reserved). Used by `computeSocialSecurityBenefits` at `TaxReturnComputeService.java:14897`.

Why the subset exists:
- **Line 21** phaseout depends on MAGI, which depends on taxable SS benefits, which depends on the Pub. 915 worksheet input — including line 21 would create a circular dependency.
- **Line 22** is reserved (hard-coded null at `TaxReturnComputeService.java:14084`).

Do **not** collapse these two accessors.

---

## 8. Data-flow summary

```
[1099-INT/OID entries]  earlyWithdrawalPenaltyAmount ─────────────────────► line18 (sum)
[1098-E entries]        studentLoanInterestReceivedAmount ─────────────────► line21 (sum, cap $2,500)
[K-1(1041) entries]     excessDeductionsSection67eAmount ──────────────────► line24k (sum)
[computeOtherIncomes()] olympicLine8m ──────────────────────────────────────► line24c (auto-fill)

[income-adjustments-taxpayer/spouse personal forms]
  educatorExpensesLine11          ── cap($300/person; $600 joint) ──────────► line11
  reservistExpensesLine12         ────────────────────────────────────────────► line12
  hsaDeductionLine13              ────────────────────────────────────────────► line13
  movingExpensesArmedForcesLine14 ────────────────────────────────────────────► line14
  penaltyOnEarlyWithdrawal (manual) ─ + statement amounts ───────────────────► line18
  alimonyPaid / SSN / date        ── post-2018 guard (BLOCKING flag) ───────► lines 19a/19b/19c
  iraDeductionLine20              ── MAGI phaseout §219(g) Pub. 590-A iter ─► line20
  studentLoanInterest (manual)    ─ + statement amounts, cap $2,500, MFS=0 ─► line21
                                  ── MAGI phaseout NOT yet enforced ────────
  archerMsaLine23                 ────────────────────────────────────────────► line23
  otherAdjustment24[a-k]          ────────────────────────────────────────────► lines 24a-24k
  otherAdjustmentsList24z         ────────────────────────────────────────────► line24z list

line25 = sum(24a..24k, 24z)                  # 12 sublines
line26 = sum(11..23) + line25                # line 22 = null (reserved)
  │
  ├─► Form1040.line10
  ├─► buildAdjustments() → line11a = line9 − line10 → AGI
  │     └─► IRA MAGI phaseout (iraDeductionTaxpayer/Spouse, isCoveredByWorkplace*)
  └─► computeSocialSecurityBenefits() → SS worksheet line 6 (via Pub. 915 SUBSET — no line 21/22)
```
